SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-17-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Continued To Nov-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Hardack Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per.
Mark Burnside is counsel for Defendant/Appellant Amazon.com
Mr. Hardack is sworn before the beginning of the Hearing.

Court convenes.
Mr. Hardack testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Hardack provides paper exhibits to the Court.

Mr. Burnside responds on behalf of his client Amazon.com
He provides various exhibits.
Mr. Burnside is sworn.

Mr. Hardack responds.
Mr. Burnside has additional remarks.
Mr. Hardack replies.
Mr. Burnside makes closing remarks.
Mr. Hardack makes his closing remarks.
Mr. Burnside offers policy language from January 2020.
Matter is submitted.
The Court rules in open court as follows:
The Court Reverses the Judgment.
Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
